across.clue: to press something firmly especially with your hands.
Garbage is waste material like unwanted or spoiled food, bottles, paper, etc.
An employee is a person who works for a company.
Danger is the possibility that someone or something will be harmed, destroyed, or killed.
a situation in which separate things happen by chance at the same time or in the same way.
If something is primary, it is the most important thing.

down.clue: To focus on something is to think about it and pay attention to it.
To deliver something is to take it from one place to another.
a book with a cover made of thick paper
An approximate calculation or judgment of the size amount or cost of something.
The image of something is a picture of it.
someone who travels by asking other people to take them in their car by standing at the side of a road and holding out their thumb or a sign.
Confidence is a feeling of certainty or ability.
If something is extremely good, it is very, very good.
to work with other people to achieve a result that is good for everyone involved
A lawyer works with the law and represents people in court.
The work that a teacher does when they teach a particular subject especially to one person or a small group.
When something is equal, it is the same in size, number, amount, or value as something else.
